body:
## Rationale
Blake Richardson (Between the Buried and Me) is one of progressive/technical metal's most searched drummers. No article exists. `/drummer/blake-richardson` profile exists. Targets: 'blake richardson drum setup', 'blake richardson drum kit', 'between the buried and me drummer'. BTBAM fanbase is dedicated and gear-curious — same tier as Travis Orbin (Periphery) and Gavin Harrison (Porcupine Tree) for tech-prog searches.

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add entry, slug: `blake-richardson-drum-setup`

## Article shape
- Title: 'Blake Richardson Drum Kit & Gear Setup — BTBAM Tech Metal'
- Drummer: blake-richardson, Band: Between the Buried and Me
- Sections: Kit overview (Pearl Reference), Zildjian/Sabian cymbals, multi-bass-drum pedal setup, complex metric-modulation technique, kit evolution across Colors/Parallax/Automata eras
- FAQ: What drums does Blake Richardson use? What cymbals does Blake Richardson play? How does Blake Richardson handle metric modulation?
- Internal links: /drummer/blake-richardson, /drummer/travis-orbin (tech-prog cluster), /technique/polyrhythm, /articles/blackwater-park-drum-setup (prog crossover)
- Quality gate: ≥300 words, ≥3 FAQ Q&As, ≥3 internal links, Article+FAQPage+BreadcrumbList schema

## Verify
1. Renders at /articles/blake-richardson-drum-setup
2. SSR returns keyword-matched title
3. Article JSON-LD in SSR (curl test)
4. BreadcrumbList present
5. Internal link to /drummer/blake-richardson present

## Done
PR merged adding blake-richardson-drum-setup to albumArticles.js.
title: SEO: Blake Richardson drum setup article — Between the Buried and Me, tech-prog metal
